question.label: Mental space for growth
question.name: Do you feel you have the bandwidth right now to take on mentoring responsibilities?
question.description: Assesses current capacity for additional roles in relation to growth and wellbeing.

answer: Honestly — the billing rewrite. I've heard whispers but nobody's talked to me about it directly. That's a bit weird.

assessment.note: Concerns about the billing rewrite indicate a slight growth stagnation and a need for clarity on upcoming responsibilities.

new_queue.label: Upcoming projects
new_queue.name: What are your initial thoughts about getting involved in the billing rewrite?

new_queue.label: Future clarity
new_queue.name: What would help you feel more prepared for the upcoming billing rewrite?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.
I'd like to do more mentoring. I brought it up maybe three months ago and nothing came of it. I'm not pushing.
Honestly — the billing rewrite. I've heard whispers but nobody's talked to me about it directly. That's a bit weird.
